title: Research
text: My research focuses on valuation and value investing, and on connecting fundamental analysis with quantitative methods, data analytics, and machine learning for prediction and decision-making.

title: Matthew Lyle
text:
I am the Goizueta Term Chair Associate Professor of Accounting at the Goizueta Business School, Emory University. Before joining Emory in 2022, I was on the faculty of the Kellogg School of Management at Northwestern University.
My research focuses on valuation and value investing, and more broadly on connecting fundamental analysis with quantitative methods, data analytics, and machine learning for prediction and decision-making. My work has appeared in The Accounting Review, the Journal of Financial Economics, and the Review of Accounting Studies.
I hold a Ph.D. in Management from the Rotman School of Management (University of Toronto) and a Ph.D. in Mathematical Finance from the University of Calgary.
